ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the driver belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the driver */,
  "driver_number" INTEGER /* Racing number of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "years_active" INTEGER /* Number of years the driver has been active in Formula 1 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "car_model" TEXT /* Model of the car used by the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Name of the team principal */,
  "technical_director" TEXT /* Name of the technical director */,
  "base_location" TEXT /* Base location of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing event */,
  "track_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the track for the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the racing event */,
  "track_length" TEXT /* Length of the track */,
  "number_of_laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in the racing event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver in the event */,
  "q1" TEXT /* Q1 lap time for the driver */,
  "q2" TEXT /* Q2 lap time for the driver */,
  "q3" TEXT /* Q3 lap time for the driver */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed by the driver */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the driver's performance */,
  "grid_position" INTEGER /* Starting grid position of the driver */,
  "fastest_lap" TEXT /* Fastest lap time achieved by the driver */,
  "fastest_lap_location" TEXT /* Location of the driver's fastest lap */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the driver in the racing event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing session */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing event */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of racing session (e.g., practice, qualifying, racing) */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the racing session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the racing session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the racing session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_sessions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_performance" (
  "session_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session performance metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing session */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver in the session */,
  "lap_time" TEXT /* Fastest lap time achieved by the driver in the session */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed by the driver in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_performance_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_performance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES racing_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team strategist, engineer, driver) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view performance metrics, edit team settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
